name: Basic Green Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onions in oil in a 3-quart saucepan until tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except broth and sour cream.
3. Cover and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Transfer mixture to food processor work bowl fitted with steel blade or blender container; cover.
5. Process until smooth, about 1 minute.
6. Return mixture to saucepan; stir in broth.
7. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
8. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
9. Stir in sour cream.
10. Cover and refrigerate any remaining sauce. Makes about 4 cups of sauce.
